all.title: New HUD
all.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
all.contents: Gave the HUD a fresh redesign. New look across the board — the status bars (Health, Stamina, Radiation) and the bottom belt all got reworked. Same info, cleaner read. More guns coming with new solo ex

all.title: Steam Thought We Were A Different Game
all.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
all.contents: They banned us for four days to check. We kind of are one now. Here's what changed. The Renderer Built our own renderer on top of UE5. We call it FDR. Feeders Dynamic Renderer. Version 2 because versi

all.title: Smoother Entrances, Better Frames
all.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
all.contents: Optimised Subway and Carnival map entrances for better FPS. Subway entrance fully reworked, reduced reflections, trimmed meshes, solid performance gain. Carnival entrance relocated, easier to find now

all.title: Hotfix: Performance Pass & Ambient Sound
all.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
all.contents: Major performance pass on Factory entrance, removed unnecessary clutter, FPS improvements. Underground improvements coming soon. Started optimization pass on Market Rooftop, and other maps more coming

all.title: Hotfix: Default Graphics Settings
all.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
all.contents: Default graphics preset is now Low for new players. The game ran fine on potato, you just didn't change the settings. Now we did it for you. Fixed a lighting issue on one scene when running on Low set

all.title: The Farming Update: Seeds, Speeds & NPC Funerals
all.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
all.contents: Added seed system, water system and placement system. Penthouse farming is live. Added Pot and Seed vendors to Rooftop Marketplace. Added News view to the FEEDERS UI. Fixed third-person attack animati

all.title: Hotfix: Fixed Clone's walk animation speed
all.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
all.contents: Fixed Clone's walk animation speed

all.title: Hotfix: Rooftop Market shader & Intro door fixes
all.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
all.contents: Removed leftover low-fidelity stylized shader Fixed a bug where the door animation would stack on itself, causing it to open multiple times, fixed, now well-behaved door.

all.title: Hotfix: Fixed right click zoom FOV glitch, decreased NPC on entry level
all.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
all.contents: Fixed right-click zoom FOV glitch Decreased NPC count on entry level

all.title: Faster Legs, Fixed NPCs
all.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
all.contents: Increased walk and run speed, you're faster now. Fixed dead NPCs still blocking/damaging player.

patches.title: Hotfix: Default Graphics Settings
patches.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
patches.contents: Default graphics preset is now Low for new players. The game ran fine on potato, you just didn't change the settings. Now we did it for you. Fixed a lighting issue on one scene when running on Low set

patches.title: The Farming Update: Seeds, Speeds & NPC Funerals
patches.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
patches.contents: Added seed system, water system and placement system. Penthouse farming is live. Added Pot and Seed vendors to Rooftop Marketplace. Added News view to the FEEDERS UI. Fixed third-person attack animati

patches.title: Hotfix: Fixed Clone's walk animation speed
patches.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
patches.contents: Fixed Clone's walk animation speed

patches.title: Hotfix: Rooftop Market shader & Intro door fixes
patches.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
patches.contents: Removed leftover low-fidelity stylized shader Fixed a bug where the door animation would stack on itself, causing it to open multiple times, fixed, now well-behaved door.

patches.title: Hotfix: Fixed right click zoom FOV glitch, decreased NPC on entry level
patches.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
patches.contents: Fixed right-click zoom FOV glitch Decreased NPC count on entry level

patches.title: Faster Legs, Fixed NPCs
patches.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
patches.contents: Increased walk and run speed, you're faster now. Fixed dead NPCs still blocking/damaging player.

latest.title: New HUD
latest.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
latest.contents: Gave the HUD a fresh redesign. New look across the board — the status bars (Health, Stamina, Radiation) and the bottom belt all got reworked. Same info, cleaner read. More guns coming with new solo ex

latest_patch.title: New HUD
latest_patch.author: Luvi Technologies, Inc.
latest_patch.contents: Gave the HUD a fresh redesign. New look across the board — the status bars (Health, Stamina, Radiation) and the bottom belt all got reworked. Same info, cleaner read. More guns coming with new solo ex
